name: NUWELLIS INC.  -,0001
summary: Nuwellis, Inc., formerly CHF Solutions, Inc., is a medical device company dedicated to changing the lives of patients suffering from fluid overload. The company is headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, and develops and markets the Aquadex FlexFlow system for ultrafiltration therapy. Its focus is on improving outcomes for patients with fluid overload related to heart failure, kidney disease, and other conditions.
